form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 5 length second at this track but did record a solid 30.01 over the 525m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 525m in 30.37. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 460m at Geelong at Grade 4/5 level. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 525m in 30.37. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 460m at Geelong at Grade 4/5 level. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 7 lengths over 485m at Horsham in a handy (27.08), beating Angry Chief. In winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 7 lengths over 485m at Horsham in a handy (27.08), beating Angry Chief. In winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (29.49) when third at Mt Gambier in a OPEN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (29.49) when third at Mt Gambier in a OPEN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Began to lost ground turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at Ballarat when a 1.3 lengths second but did run a useful 31.16 over the 545m journey. Warrants respect.

form.formComment: Jumped well at Sandown two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 525m. Should be around the mark.

formComments.comment: Jumped well at Sandown two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 525m. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Launceston over 600m. Last start finished 5th in a NG on March 28 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Off The Chart beaten 2.75 lengths (29.68). Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.25) when fourth over 525m at this track in a Grade 5. Has two wins and six placings from 13 starts from the draw. Looks well placed and should feature.
